overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of an industrial district in a futuristic city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning under overhead pipe structures with digital billboards, crossing an intersection with a distinctive mega-building, and ending in a narrow industrial alley between warehouse structures. The scene features bright morning sunlight, smokestacks emitting steam, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial walkway beneath overhead pipe structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk beneath large overhead pipes and a digital billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with Japanese text and graphics mounted on industrial framework
network of large metal pipes and gantries spanning across the walkway overhead
tall concrete wall with metal railings on top, separating walkway from lower industrial area
tall industrial chimney emitting white smoke into the sky
metal security fence running along the top of the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive industrial pipe structure. A prominent digital billboard hangs overhead displaying neon graphics. To the left, a concrete retaining wall with chain-link fencing separates the walkway from industrial facilities below, while a smokestack billows white smoke in the distance. The path is empty of people and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial street with factory buildings and distant skyline

events.description: exits the covered pipe structure into open industrial street with clear sky overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up, approaching an intersection with distant skyscrapers visible

entered.detail: large beige industrial complex with multiple levels and loading docks
futuristic high-rise buildings visible on the horizon beyond the industrial zone
tall pole with orange fixture and overhead traffic signal

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide industrial street bathed in morning sunlight. The concrete retaining wall recedes into the distance on the left, revealing a large factory building. Overhead power lines crisscross the sky, and futuristic skyscrapers loom on the distant horizon. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction along the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with futuristic mega-structure and traffic

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles and pedestrians
turning left at the intersection to enter a narrow industrial passage

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left, moving from the open street into a narrower industrial corridor

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk in the same direction as the camera
blue van driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: massive distinctive building with geometric black and red structural elements and glass facades
tall palm tree standing in the center median of the intersection
overhead traffic signal suspended on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and crosses a sunlit intersection, revealing a striking futuristic mega-building on the right with dramatic architecture. A palm tree stands in the center island as pedestrians cross the street. After crossing, the camera turns left, leaving the main road behind. A blue van passes through the intersection during the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley between warehouse buildings with overhead pipes

events.description: entering narrow industrial alley between two large warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow passage between industrial warehouses, moving toward blue storage silos in the distance

entered.detail: large dark industrial building with metal siding and small windows
matching industrial structure with loading docks and metal stairs
metal framework connecting the two warehouse buildings overhead
tall cylindrical blue industrial tanks visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrow industrial alley, the camera moves between two massive warehouse buildings connected by overhead pipe bridges. The space is enclosed and shadowed compared to the open intersection. Weeds and debris litter the cracked concrete ground. At the end of the passage, large blue storage silos are visible against the sky, marking the destination ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial corridor into a bright city intersection before descending into a shadowed warehouse alley. It begins beneath a massive pipe structure and a neon digital billboard, moving past a chain-link fence and a distant smokestack billowing white smoke. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit street where the concrete walls recede to reveal a large factory and futuristic skyscrapers on the horizon. The camera then crosses a bright intersection, passing a blue van and a central palm tree to reveal a dramatic mega-building, before turning left away from the main road. Finally, the environment shifts from the open sunlight into a narrow, enclosed alleyway between massive warehouses and overhead pipe bridges, moving over cracked concrete toward large blue storage silos.
